snippet.title: The Mummy Returns | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Open your Free Upstox Gold Account and get Free E-Gold worth Rs. 51 - https://upstox.com/open-gold-account/?utm_source=influencer&utm_medium=organic&utm_term=AshishChanchlaniMay21&f=G5LB

Sooo finally aa gayi hai humari NEW VIDEOO
Pehle toh bhai maaf kar do hum logo ne itna delay kar diya
Sabhi seth logo se maafi
Thoda ghar ki takleef aur team waalo ke family problems ke kaaran hum sab busy ho gaye the
But we are backkkkk 
Presenting to you humara new video ‚ÄúTHE MUMMY RETURNS‚ÄĚ
Ye waali mummy us egypt waali mummy se bhi danger hai lekin apni hai
Dekho ye video humne bahut safely shoot kiya hai aur ghar mein shoot kiya (aur koi option tha kya thanks to wo ghatiya virus)
Mere bhai @Jashan Sirwani  aur  @Tanish Sirwani  ko ghar pe bulaya chatai becha ke sulaya because social distancing zaroori hai aur fir unke saath ye video plan kiya
Is video mein hai padaishi maali @Ritesh Sadhwani aur khandaani daaku dikhne waala @Rohit Sadhwani 
Is video mein apni purani kaam waali bai bhi hai (haan wohi jisne mera valentine kharab kiya) wo  Bhavika Motwani jaise dikhne waali.
Is video mein @Kunal Chhabhria seth bhi hai
Lekin unhone apna part khud shoot kiya kyunki bhai ne khud ko quarrantine kar diya tha 
Lekin dedication dekh rahe ho launde ki? (Ghanta, sab paise ka khel hai babu bhaiya)
Lekin ye video banake bahut maza aaya kyunki maine triple role kiya toh kaafi dino baad swaad aa gaya
Baaki bhaiyo aur unki behno wig mein bahut garmi hoti hai
Mere paseeno ke lie is video ko like kar do seth logūüôŹ
Aur video please end tak dekhna apni mummiyo ke saath 
Aapki puri family ke lie hi toh khaas banayi hai
Mummy se puch ke batana kaunsa scene unko acha laga aur comment karna wo
(Ho sake toh mummy ka reaction record karna)
Baaki meri taraf se saari mummiyo ko, wives,sisters as well as daughters ko bhi
Happy Mother‚Äôs day‚Ě§ÔłŹūü•ļ
Sabko puri ACV team ka bahut saara pyaar yaar
Apna sab dhyaan do please aur maa baap ka khaas kar, time kharab chal raha hai, lekin hum sab ek saath isse ladh lengeūüí™
Sending loads of love to all ACVIANS‚Ě§ÔłŹ
LOVE YOUU 
#AshishChanchlani  #TheMummyReturns #MothersDay

snippet.title: Best Action Scene (Gaja Thakur) Hindi Dubbed Love Story | Darshan, Navya Nair Romantic Love Scene
snippet.description:
Movie Nam :Gaja Thakur
Starring :Darshan, Navya Nair

Gaja (Darshan) and Krishna are friends. Gaja goes out to Krishna's village for a holiday but finds some startling events happening. He finds that Krishna's brother Devendra has a running feud with a rival faction, which prevents a harmonious relationship between the two families. But Gaja becomes a darling of Devendra's family and he also takes a liking to Shwetha (Navya Nair), the sister of Devendra.

#HerneKatha #BhampaRai

Stories of Bhutanese refugees in Nepal who want to go back to their country. 


Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
ūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹ Become our Patron ūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹ
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ Herne Katha ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.

If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience.

We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

Weiss and David Zucker, and starring Drake Bell, Sara Paxton, Christopher McDonald, and Leslie Nielsen. It was originally titled Superhero! as a nod to one of the Zuckers' previous films, Airplane!, in which Nielsen also starred.

snippet.title: 24 Hour OVERNIGHT TRAMPOLINE Challenge | MyMissAnand
snippet.description:
It's a hot summer and Anantya has taken up the 24hr Trampoline challenge. Watch how she makes her day through this and how her favorite Tang orange becomes her enabler in this. Keep yourself and your family well hydrated with Tang this summer and maintain immunity with the Vitamin A, B, C and iron present in Tang.
Follow the recipe in video to recreate this awesome Tang Orange Almond cracker and share the images or videos with us on Facebook or Instagram tagging Page 1 www.SpiceUpMedia.com
@tang_india. You can also upload them on https://tangtails.com/.
Top 10 winning entries will get Chef Kunal Kapur's new
cookbook. The next 90 entries will get a year's worth of Tang, absolutely free! So hurry, as the last day to submit your entries is 31st May, 2021. *T&C applied. For T&C - https://tangtails.com/

Watch this video till the end and tell us in the community post‚Äôs comment section that you loved this challenge or not. Agar apko video accha laga ho toh apne doston, rishtedaro ko sab ko SHARE karna...
For more video on Good Habits, Switch-up Challenge and games, and Short Moral story
Subscribe to MyMissAnand: https://www.youtube.com/user/mymissanand

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Episode 5 | Pre... Mains Aur Life | Season Finale
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

IAS Abhilash Sharma is struggling when the past meets the present. What changes things for Abhilash? Will 'the tripod' find its lost balance?

Listen to Music from the Series: https://smarturl.it/aspirantsmusic

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma, Nilotpal Bora
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 

UPSC fact #69: Steven Wolfe from Pittsburgh, USA, is widely regarded as one of the smartest, most qualified person alive. He was a doctor, an engineer, a firefighter, a soldier, an astronaut, a teacher, and a soldier. Scientists asked him to give UPSC exam as an experiment. He couldn't crack it even after multiple attempts. He later admitted that the difficulty level of the exam is inhuman.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

šłúšļ¨Ś§ćšĽáŤÄÖ

Episode 06 : Regret
Episode Summary : 
Pah-chin, the captain of Tokyo Manji Gang 3rd Squad, had his best friend beaten up. Following this, a fight between the Tokyo Maji Gang and Moebius, the gang that ruled the Shinjuku area, is about to begin. According to Naoto, Draken died not in the fight with Moebius but rather during an infight in Tokyo Manji Gang. To learn about the truth behind what really happened that day, Takemichi returned to the present and meet the president of Moebius, Nobutaka Osanai.

snippet.description:
Explore Infinix Hot 10 Play - https://knw.one/0v2d0

In today's episode of Duniyadari Editor Saurabh Dwivedi explains the Israel Palestine Conflict as the tensions between Israel and Palestine have reached their peak.  Palestinian militants fired several rockets from Gaza. After this, Israeli security forces also carried out strong airstrikes on Philistenian territories. The Israeli attack killed more than 23 people, including nine children, in Gaza. Over 100 Palestinians have been injured in clashes with Israeli security forces in Jerusalem and the West Bank region over the past 24 hours. What's the reason behind this fresh violence? What's the history of Temple Mount, called Haram-al-Sharif by Muslims? What's the history of Al-Aqsa mosque and Dome of the Rock? What's Temple Mount? Why Jerusalem is so dear to Jews, Christians and Muslims? Watch this episode for more details.

India Alert Ep: 518 Saas Ka Raaz
This episode of India Alert the #story about a newly #married #girl Geeta. Geeta noticed her #mother-in-law was secretly locked in a #room,¬†Her condition was similar as lifeless, Soon she came to know that she is corpse, but her in-laws believed as alive and obeyed a #Gurudev. They were completely under Baba's control.Now how will Geeta expose that baba's reality? To know more watch the full episode of India alert only on Dangal TV channel.¬†

snippet.title: GAGAN THAPA ŗ§łŗ§Āŗ§ó ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§®ŗ•Äŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§ē ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•Äŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ėŗ§Ņ ŗ§ēŗ•čŗ§įŗ•čŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ģŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§ģ | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
snippet.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

ŗ§Źŗ§™ŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§ü ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§ē ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ģŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ•Į ŗ§¨ŗ§úŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§£ ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§§ŗ§ģŗ§łŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§óŗ§ģŗ§Į ŗ§łŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ē ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ö,ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§≠ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§į ŗ§Čŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§Ėŗ•čŗ§úŗ•Ä ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§öŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§öŗ§Ņŗ§§ ŗ§üŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§úŗ§® ŗ§Öŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•č ŗ•§ ŗ§úŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§® ŗ§≠ŗ•čŗ§óŗ§ĺŗ§áŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§¨ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§Üŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§ģŗ§Ņŗ§ē ŗ§įŗ§āŗ§óŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§áŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ•áŗ§£ŗ•Ä ŗ§Įŗ§ł ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ģŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ§łŗ•Āŗ§ēŗ•ą ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§ě ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•áŗ§∑ŗ§ē ŗ§§ŗ§•ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Čŗ§¶ŗ§ĺŗ§Ļŗ§įŗ§£ŗ•Äŗ§Į ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§ą ŗ§Öŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§•ŗ§Ņŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§įŗ•āŗ§™ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§Čŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§óŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§õ ŗ•§ ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§üŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§į ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•ą ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§Ěŗ•Ćŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§®ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§®ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ģŗ§ĺ ŗ§Üŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§ú ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§Ėŗ§įŗ§Ņŗ§§ ŗ§óŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§®ŗ•Ā ŗ§Įŗ§ł ŗ§ēŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ģŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§Ėŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§Čŗ§¶ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§Ļŗ•č ŗ•§

snippet.title: UN warns of ‚Äúfull-scale war‚ÄĚ as Israel-Palestinian violence intensifies - BBC News
snippet.description:
The United Nations is warning of the risk of "full-scale war" as the clashes between Israeli forces and Palestinians continue.

Israel's Prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, warned Palestinian militants that this was just the beginning, threatening to strike with ‚Äúblows they haven't dreamed of‚ÄĚ.  

The United States is sending a senior diplomat to the Middle East to urge Israelis and Palestinians to end the violence. 

At least 65 Palestinians including 15 children and six Israelis are reported to have been killed since the fighting began.

In the past few days Palestinian militants have fired barrages of rockets  into Israel, many aimed at Tel Aviv. Israel has carried out a heavy bombardment of Gaza launching hundreds of air strikes. 

Tensions have been growing in Jerusalem, partly due to a long-running threat to evict Palestinians from their homes in occupied East Jerusalem in an area claimed by Jewish settlers. 

Sophie Raworth presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Tom Bateman in Jerusalem, Rushdi Abualouf in Gaza and Caroline Hawley.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

#HerneKatha #LahurekoGaun

Story of a abandoned village near Pokhara in Western Nepal.



Join this channel to Support Herne Katha. 
http://bit.ly/JoinHerneKatha

========================
ūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹ Become our Patron ūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹūüíĀ‚Äć‚ôāÔłŹ
You can make monthly contribution to support the production cost of Herne Katha. 
Support us on Patreon: https://bit.ly/2BrQzlQ 


==== Why Herne Katha? ====
People behind Herne Katha spent 15 years of their lives doing journalism. One day they realised the need to tell more beautiful and inspiring stories of people, the real people. 


ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ Herne Katha ūüĎÄūüĎÄūüĎÄ
Herne Katha is a web series produced by Tana Bana Digital in Nepal. We tell stories of people in the format of short documentaries. New episode of Herne Katha is published on  every  alternate Tuesdays (15 days) on YouTube. You can also watch Herne  Katha on Kantipur  Television every Tuesday 6:30 PM.


ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ Herne  Katha Team ūüöÄūüöÄūüöÄ

ūüé¨ Script/Direction - Kamal Kumar (http://bit.ly/KamalKumarFB)

ūüĎ© Presenter - Bidhya Chapagain (http://bit.ly/BidhyaTwitter)

ūüé• Cinematographer - Jeevan Rijal (http://bit.ly/JeevanRFB)

ūüĖ• Video Editor - Sandesh Pariyar (http://bit.ly/sandeshpfb)

ūüéģ Multimedia Producer - Ashma Adhikari (http://bit.ly/AshmaInsta)

ūüďĚ Producer - Enuma Rai (http://bit.ly/EnumaFB)

ūüĎćūüŹľ Social Media Producer - Bijay Khadka (http://bit.ly/BijayInsta)

‚úČÔłŹ Business Development Officer - Pratistha Acharya (http://bit.ly/PratisthaFB)

ūüöć Driver - Debendra Rai (http://bit.ly/DebendraFB)


ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć Follow Herne Katha ūüĎćūüĎćūüĎć
ūüĎČ IMDB: https://www.imdb.com/title/tt8103440/
ūüĎČ Facebook:  https://facebook.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Twitter: https://twitter.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Instagram: https://instagram.com/hernekatha
ūüĎČ Website: https://hernekatha.com
ūüĎČ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hernekatha

ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ Share your Story ūüíĆūüíĆūüíĆ 
If you have a story that is suitable for Herne Katha, please do not hesitate to contact us. 

ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ For Advertisers ūüí≤ūüí≤ūüí≤ 
If you are an advertiser interested in our show please write us an email  hello@hernekatha.com


ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ For Singers and Musicians ūüé∂ūüé∂ūüé∂ 
If you are an emerging artist or musicians, we need you. We want to feature your creation in our episodes and support you to get noticed by thousands of our audience. 


ūüé®ūüé®ūüé® For all Creatives ūüé®ūüé®ūüé®
Have an idea about anything? Anything related to telling people's stories in bold and beautiful style. Share your ideas with us. We love ideas.  


ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ Sorry ūüėĘūüėĘūüėĘ 
We put a lot of effort to create a single episode of Herne Katha. We will be heartbroken if somebody copies and re-uploads our videos. However, we feel good if you share our links or embed our videos on your blog/website.

snippet.title: ŗ§¶ŗ•čŗ§≤ŗ§Ėŗ§ĺ ŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§łŗ•áŗ§®ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§ą ŗ§ęŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§łŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ! ŗ§Öŗ§¨ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§õ ?  ŗ§Įŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§õ ŗ§ąŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ł  ! Dolakha Bhimsen Pasina
snippet.description:
ŗ§¶ŗ•čŗ§≤ŗ§Ėŗ§ĺ ŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§łŗ•áŗ§®ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§ą ŗ§ęŗ•áŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Üŗ§Įŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§łŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ! ŗ§Öŗ§¨ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§õ ?  ŗ§Įŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•č ŗ§õ ŗ§ąŗ§§ŗ§Ņŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ł  ! Dolakha Bhimsen Pasina

Dolakha Bhimsen Temple (Nepali: ŗ§¶ŗ•čŗ§≤ŗ§Ėŗ§ĺ ŗ§≠ŗ§Ņŗ§ģŗ§łŗ•áŗ§® ŗ§ģŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§į) is located in the Bhimeshwar municipality of Dolakha in Nepal, approximately 4.5 km east of Charikot. The temple is roofless in the center and it houses a triangular-shaped stone idol of Bhimsen. The idol is believed to resemble three deities: Bhimeshwar in the morning, Mahadeva throughout the day, and Narayana in the evening. The temple attracts around 5,000 worshippers every week. The temple is believed to signal any bad fortune before it takes place

Sweating of idol
Perspiration is considered a bad omen for the country. It is believed that Bhimsen himself tries to protect his people by warning them through sweating. Historically, when such an event occurred, the priest soaked the sweat in cotton and sent the cotton to the royal palace

snippet.title: Nepal sees explosion in COVID-19 cases | DW News
snippet.description:
International aid is now flowing in to support overwhelmed hospitals in India. The country has been hit hard by a new variant. Neighbouring Nepal is also struggling to contain an explosion in cases. Vaccines are in short supply - and nearly half those tested are found to be positive. It's feared the situation may be as bad, if not worse, than in India. 
India is still registering record daily COVID-19 deaths and infections. Officials have reported more than 400,000 new cases in the last day. Almost 4,000 people died. Mass gatherings at recent religious and political rallies have also been blamed for spreading the virus.

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can‚Äôt ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

Listen to Music from the Series: https://smarturl.it/aspirantsmusic

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

Music at the Bar: Love U More By Riley & TOMOS
Publishers: Soundcast Music

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It‚Äôs a True Story.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra‚Äôs Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #VishalMishra #AlyJasmin

aag lagayega

tu bhi sataya jayega

sabko tune kitna rulaya

baaz na aayega

sach ye saamne aayega

tu bhi sataya jayega

tu bhi rulaya jayega

tu bhi sataya jayega

jeete ji haan tune

phir khaab unhi se cheene

hota haan khuda hai
Muh kaise dikhlayega, 
haaye bada

tu bhi sataya jayega

tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega

snippet.title: Shrinkhala Khatiwada ŗ§Ļŗ•áŗ§üŗ•Ćŗ§āŗ§°ŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ėŗ§Ņ ŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§°ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§ēŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•Ä | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
snippet.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

ne.title: Shrinkhala Khatiwada ŗ§Ļŗ•áŗ§üŗ•Ćŗ§āŗ§°ŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§Ėŗ§Ņ ŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§°ŗ§łŗ§ģŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§ēŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•Ä | TAMASOMA JYOTIRGAMAYA | AP1HD
ne.description:
Tamasoma Jyotirgamaya is one of the most popular television talk shows in the nation. As the name suggests it is an effort to explore the true knowledge on the national and international affairs that matter to the communities and the human race as a whole. The guests of the shows include top political leaderships and renowned figures from different walks of life, mostly associated with the contested affairs. The host of the show is Mr. Tikaram Yatri, the editor-in-chief of AP1HD Television. The broadcast time of the show is Monday (9 to 10 PM).

snippet.title: Radhe | Trailer | Salman Khan | Disha Patani | Randeep Hooda | Jackie Shroff | Prabhudeva | 13 May
snippet.description:
Yeh Eid, #Radhe Ke Saath
Countdown starts now!

#RadheTrailerOutNow

#SalmanKhan #JackieShroff #DishaPatani #RadeepHooda #PrabhuDeva #SKFFilms #ZeeStudios #SohailKhan #Atul #ReelLifeProduction #ZeeMusicCompany #ZeePlexOfficial #ZEE5 
 
The film will have a  multi-format release & a wide theatrical release internationally on 13th May 2021. It will release in over 40 countries including Middle East, USA, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UK, Europe among others.

Directed by Prabhudeva

snippet.title: The Act At The Railway Station | CID | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

News State (ŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§ú ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§üŗ•áŗ§ü) ŗ§Čŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§į ŗ§≠ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§§ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ§¨ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§łŗ§®ŗ•Äŗ§Į ŗ§Ļŗ§Ņŗ§āŗ§¶ŗ•Ä ŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ•āŗ§úŗ§ľ ŗ§öŗ•ąŗ§®ŗ§≤ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą. ŗ§Įŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ā ŗ§™ŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ•áŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§łŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§úŗ§įŗ•āŗ§įŗ•Ä ŗ§Ėŗ§¨ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•Äŗ§Įŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§¶ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§§ŗ§ē ŗ§™ŗ§Ļŗ•Āŗ§āŗ§öŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą. ŗ§Įŗ§Ļŗ§ĺŗ§ā ŗ§™ŗ§į ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§®ŗ•Äŗ§§ŗ§Ņ ŗ§Ļŗ•Ä ŗ§®ŗ§Ļŗ•Äŗ§ā ŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ§≠ŗ§į ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•č ŗ§įŗ§Ļŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą, ŗ§áŗ§łŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§¨ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§≠ŗ§įŗ§™ŗ•āŗ§į ŗ§Ėŗ§¨ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ėŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą. ŗ§áŗ§łŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§Öŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§Ķŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§áŗ§ģ, ŗ§¨ŗ§Ņŗ§úŗ§®ŗ•áŗ§ł, ŗ§Ėŗ•áŗ§≤ ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§¨ŗ•Čŗ§≤ŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ•Āŗ§° ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§úŗ•Āŗ§°ŗ§ľŗ•Ä ŗ§§ŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ§ľŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ėŗ§ľŗ§¨ŗ§įŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§≠ŗ•Ä ŗ§¶ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•ąŗ§ā. News State UP-UK ŗ§Ėŗ§ĺŗ§ł ŗ§§ŗ•Ćŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ§į ŗ§Čŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§į ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§Čŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§Ėŗ§āŗ§° ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§óŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§Ėŗ§¨ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•Ä ŗ§úŗ§įŗ•āŗ§įŗ§§ŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§ßŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§® ŗ§įŗ§Ėŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą.  ŗ§Ķŗ§Ļŗ•Äŗ§ā, News State MP-CG ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•áŗ§∑ ŗ§įŗ•āŗ§™ ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§ģŗ§ßŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§™ŗ•ćŗ§įŗ§¶ŗ•áŗ§∂ ŗ§Ēŗ§į ŗ§õŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§łŗ§óŗ§Ęŗ§ľ ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§¶ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∂ŗ§ēŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ėŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§≤ ŗ§įŗ§Ėŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ļŗ•ą. ŗ§łŗ§¨ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§∑ŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ§ēŗ•ćŗ§∑, ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§łŗ§®ŗ•Äŗ§Į ŗ§≤ŗ§ĺŗ§áŗ§Ķ ŗ§Ėŗ§ľŗ§¨ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§ā ŗ§ēŗ•č ŗ§łŗ§¨ŗ§łŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ§Ļŗ§≤ŗ•á ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§ēŗ•á ŗ§≤ŗ§Ņŗ§Ź ŗ§¨ŗ§®ŗ•á ŗ§įŗ§Ļŗ•áŗ§ā ŗ§Ļŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•á ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§•.

News State is a 24-hour Hindi news channel that caters in addition to National coverage, regional coverages too. We have regional channels like News State Uttar Pradesh/Uttarakhand and News State Madhya Pradesh/Chattisgarh. In terms of TRP News State UP/UK is number one channel in the northern India region. No other channel is in competition with our channel. It is because we give trustworthy and quick news. News State is a preferred channel by an audience which favors high quality programming and news.

Only Channel in the region that caters for the regional demand in such a way that it has become favourite channel of the audience.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 102 May 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital

snippet.title: Tamil Superstar VIJAY Action Hindi Dubbed Movie | Dum 2 - ŗ§¶ŗ§ģ 2 | Jyothika, Vivek
snippet.description: The movie story deals with Thirumalai a mechanic who lives with his friends and parents in Puthupet, Chennai. On the occasion of 2002 New Year's Eve, he meets Swetha and falls in love with her. But due to her arrogant behavior, Thirumalai is beat up by her goons. After realizing his good nature, she reciprocates his feelings. This is opposed by her father Ashok, who calls a thug named Arasu, who has a reputation of being a big mafia crime boss in Chennai. Hence, Thirumalai fights with them and this makes Arasu realize all of his misbehavior. In the end, Arasu changes his mind about the match, and Ashok also realizes his mistakes. He accepts their love finally, and both reunite with each other.

snippet.description:
#CoronaInUP #COVID19inUttarPradesh #CoronavirusInIndia #Covid19India #CoronaUpdate During the ground coverage of The Lallantop's Corona Zamini Hakikat, the team of The Lallantop visited Hallet Hospital in Kanpur to know the reality of arrangements and management done by the administration to overcome the Coronavirus pandemic in the city. 
While talking to the family members of corona patients, The Lallantop came across the wife of a deceased man who shared that her husband complained of being beaten by doctors while getting treatment for Covid-19. As of April 27, India's most populous state reported a total of over 11.2 lakh cases, including 33,551 in the last 24 hours. The total death toll has reached 11,414 according to official figures. The Opposition has accused the state government of under-reporting Covid-19 figures and trying to paint a rosy picture.

snippet.title: SaifAli Khan & Jacqueline Fernandez New Movie Full 2021 | Latest New Bollywood Full HD Movies 2021
snippet.description:
A robbery takes place and European printing plates are stolen. Businessman Ranvir Singh (Saif Ali Khan) goes to a casino owner, Vikram Thapar (Rajesh Khattar), claiming to have been behind the robbery. He offers Thapar ‚ā¨1.5 billion in counterfeit currency in exchange for ‚ā¨500 million real banknotes. Thapar agrees and borrows the ‚ā¨500 million from ex street-fighter and Underworld Don Armaan Malik (John Abraham). It is then revealed that Ranvir never stole the printing plates, and was conning Thapar. Now, unable to return Armaan's money, Thapar is forced to give Armaan control of five casinos that he owns in Istanbul, Turkey.

The con is a plan that Ranvir made a week earlier with Armaan, who he met through Robert "RD" D'Costa (Anil Kapoor) and his dim-witted assistant Cherry (Ameesha Patel). Ranvir gives Armaan ownership of Thapar's casinos in exchange for a 10% commission. The two become friends and business partners.

Ranvir meets Armaan's half-sister Aleena (Deepika Padukone) and develops a romantic affair with her. Aleena is revealed to be Armaan's 50% shareholder and constant partner in crime.

A glamorous and stylish lady, Omisha (Jacqueline Fernandez) is introduced as Armaan's girlfriend. Ranvir sees a picture of his deceased wife Sonia (Bipasha Basu) in Omisha's wallet and he begins to woo her in order to gain her confidence. His real plan is to bankrupt Armaan because Armaan and Thapar were responsible for Sonia's death. Omisha tells him that she is Sonia's sister.

Ranvir plans to steal the Shroud of Turin and sell it to Armaan. After that, he will steal both the shroud and Armaan's billions of dollars. However, RD, who is afraid of Armaan, betrays Ranvir and tells Armaan the truth. Armaan asks Godfather Anza (Aditya Pancholi) to give 15 billion euros as an investment. However, Armaan has to win a fight with fighter Typhoon. Aleena reveals Armaan was the one who planted a bomb in her car to kill her, and decides to help Ranvir. Ranvir steals the shroud while Armaan wins his fight with Typhoon.

During the celebration, Aleena poisons Ranvir's glass. As he slowly dies, Armaan reveals that thanks to RD, he knew his plan and Aleena was never on Ranvir's side. Omisha is also on Armaan's side and is not Sonia's sister. After Ranvir dies, Armaan and Omisha retrieve the shroud and leave in their private jet. There, Armaan points his gun at Aleena, revealing that he'd been planning to kill her to take her share of the money. Suddenly, Ranvir crashes through the wall; Aleena never poisoned his drink. Aleena tells Armaan that she is on Ranvir's side, knowing Armaan was trying to kill her. Ranvir reveals that RD never betrayed him; he himself told RD to inform Armaan of the real plan to make Armaan think he was ahead of Ranvir.

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 25 April 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Katai Uslai (Samaya)
snippet.description:
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Acoustic Guitar, Harmonica

Written, composed and arranged by Bipul Chettri.
Recorded, mixed and mastered by Anindo Bose at Plug 'N' Play Studios.
Cover artwork and design by Manohar Rai.

Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

Note: You can purchase the song at this brand new platform for independent Nepali music.
https://noodlerex.com.np/songs/350/

This is a message that the listener is being asked to carry to a lover left behind in the past. From the very first lines, one senses the sender‚Äôs yearning for closure, forgiveness and absolution. A more perceptive ear will pick up the desperation of a man who wishes he could go back in time and set things right, for he has just realised that there can be no one else quite like her. But, it is the resignation with which the words are sung that reveal that he is aware that this is but just a fantasy. While the past maybe be exactly where he left it, everything and everyone else have moved on. Performed with the typical precipitous western classical-styled finger-picking that Bipul has now come to be associated with, the bittersweet song comes to an end with the wail of a Dylanesque harmonica solo.

(Liner Notes by Nima D.T. Namchu)

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2021.

snippet.title: Comedy Champion Season 2 - TOP 9 Episode 15
snippet.description:
Comedy Champion Season 2 - TOP 9 Episode 15

Special Guest: Keki Adhikari, Nirajan Pradhan

a super successful Season 1, we are back to sweep you off your feet and make your stomachs ache. Comedy Champion Season 2! 

The judges for the show are Legendary Artist Santosh Pant, Popular Stand-Up Comedian Manoj Gajurel, Celebrated Director Pradip Bhattarai, and Talented Actress Reecha Sharma hosted by Prominent VJ Rima Bishwokarma.  

It‚Äôs a Three Production Presentation.
